notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Secure Rural Schools and Community Self-Determination Act of 2000, which is classified principally to this chapter. children.text: to stabilize and transition payments to counties to provide funding for schools and roads that supplements other available funds;

children.label: i
children.text: improve the maintenance of existing infrastructure;

children.label: ii
children.text: implement stewardship objectives that enhance forest ecosystems; and

children.label: iii
children.text: restore and improve land health and water quality;

children.label: i
children.text: road, trail, and infrastructure maintenance or obliteration;

children.label: v
children.text: the restoration, maintenance, and improvement of wildlife and fish habitat;

children.label: vi
children.text: the control of noxious and exotic weeds; and

children.label: vii
children.text: the reestablishment of native species; and

children.label: A
children.text: the people that use and care for Federal land; and

children.label: B
children.text: the agencies that manage the Federal land.
